poi.info:
[- OPTIONAL SIDEPATH -] Open your Achievement Panel > Character Adventure Guide > Adventure Guide Volume Three > [Defeating Elder Dragon Minions]
Kill icebrood here until you kill 100 and complete this achievement.
You may need to do a couple passes but when you are done go to the end of the main trail for a waypoint to continue to.

[- SPECIAL INSTRUCTIONS -] We will be completeing this entire zone.
• Please be sure not to skip ahead and follow the trail. • Be aware the first 1/3 of this zone will be the hardest part of the run in terms of staying alive. • Dont skip upgrading your gear! Upgrading is super helpful. • Using your warclaw when you get low to run around for a bit to regain health is good as well.
Dont get discouraged, you will ramp up quickly.

[- SPECIAL INSTRUCTIONS -] If its just Noxia here with the [Determined] buff, you can just run past to the hero point.
If its Noxia and Vilnia Shadowsong then kill them and continue to the hero point.
This event likes to bug. Once Vilnia Shadowsong is dead, the state of Noxia doesnt matter and you can run past to the hero point.
[- REMEMBER TO GATHER -] Keep an eye out for harvest nodes. We need to harvest any node type 75 times in this zone.
[- REMEMBER TO GATHER -] Keep an eye out for harvest nodes. We need to harvest any node type 75 times in this zone.
[- REMEMBER TO GATHER -] Keep an eye out for harvest nodes. We need to harvest any node type 75 times in this zone.

[- WATCH FOR EVENTS -] Completing events is the only thing in this run we cant fully control.
That means watching for events constantly is crucial.
If you see an event, go to it, period. [Alt] + [Click] on the trail on the mini-map where you left off and come back after the event.
Also, look for npc's that can start events and do those as well.

[- WATCH FOR EVENTS -] Completing events is the only thing in this run we cant fully control.
That means watching for events constantly is crucial.
If you see an event, go to it, period. [Alt] + [Click] on the trail on the mini-map where you left off and come back after the event.
Also, look for npc's that can start events and do those as well.

[- WATCH FOR EVENTS -] Completing events is the only thing in this run we cant fully control.
That means watching for events constantly is crucial.
If you see an event, go to it, period. [Alt] + [Click] on the trail on the mini-map where you left off and come back after the event.
Also, look for npc's that can start events and do those as well.

[- WATCH FOR EVENTS -] Completing events is the only thing in this run we cant fully control.
That means watching for events constantly is crucial.
If you see an event, go to it, period. [Alt] + [Click] on the trail on the mini-map where you left off and come back after the event.
Also, look for npc's that can start events and do those as well.

[- WATCH FOR EVENTS -] Completing events is the only thing in this run we cant fully control.
That means watching for events constantly is crucial.
If you see an event, go to it, period. [Alt] + [Click] on the trail on the mini-map where you left off and come back after the event.
Also, look for npc's that can start events and do those as well.

[- WATCH FOR EVENTS -] Completing events is the only thing in this run we cant fully control.
That means watching for events constantly is crucial.
If you see an event, go to it, period. [Alt] + [Click] on the trail on the mini-map where you left off and come back after the event.
Also, look for npc's that can start events and do those as well.

[- WATCH FOR EVENTS -] Completing events is the only thing in this run we cant fully control.
That means watching for events constantly is crucial.
If you see an event, go to it, period. [Alt] + [Click] on the trail on the mini-map where you left off and come back after the event.
Also, look for npc's that can start events and do those as well.

poi.tip-description: These steps are not on the route and must also be completed while in this zone!
These steps are not on the route and must also be completed while in this zone!

poi.info:
[- SELL / SALVAGE -] • Purchase a [Salvage Kit] (if needed) • Purchase a [Harvesting Sickle] • Purchase a [Logging Axe] • Purchase a [Mining Pick]
Salvage any items not needed & sell what cannot be salvaged to vendor.
What salvage kit you purchase depends on what you want to salvage. Use Basic for white/blue, use Fine for greens, and Master's for yellow/orange. As for tools, always buy the highest tools you can equip.
[- REMEMBER -] Keep all luck! Do not sell or use!

[- SELL / SALVAGE -] • Purchase a [Salvage Kit] (if needed) • Purchase a [Harvesting Sickle] • Purchase a [Logging Axe] • Purchase a [Mining Pick]
Salvage any items not needed & sell what cannot be salvaged to vendor.
What salvage kit you purchase depends on what you want to salvage. Use Basic for white/blue, use Fine for greens, and Master's for yellow/orange. As for tools, always buy the highest tools you can equip.
[- REMEMBER -] Keep all luck! Do not sell or use!

[- PURCHASE UPGRADES / RESTOCK -] Depending on what boosters/buffs you have you May be just a bit overleveled or way overleveled but either way you probably feel a bit squishy. So take this time to fix that.
*** do not skip doing upgrades! ***
[- FOOD / UTILITY -] • Bowl of Candy Corn Custard • Quality Sharpening Stone
[- ARMOR / WEAPON UPGRADES -] This process will always be the same • Click the cog icon • Make the level tange -5/+1 current level • Click the first dropdown and select Power • Click the fifth dropdown and select fine/masterwork • Sort by price and buy +What is cheapest +What is closest in level • Click through each category and tepeat
[- OPTIONAL ITEMS -] • (4) Rune of Vampirism • (2) Rune of the Warrior • (2) Sigil of Blood • (2) Sigil of Fire

[- PURCHASE UPGRADES / RESTOCK -] Depending on what boosters/buffs you have you may be just a bit overleveled or way overleveled but either way you probably feel a bit squishy. So take this time to fix that.
*** DO NOT SKIP DOING UPGRADES! ***
[- FOOD / UTILITY -] • Bowl of Candy Corn Custard • Artisan Tuning Crystal
[- ARMOR / WEAPON UPGRADES -] This process will always be the same • Click the cog icon • Make the level range -5/+1 current level • Click the first dropdown and select condition • Click the fifth dropdown and select fine/masterwork • Sort by price and buy +What is cheapest +What is closest in level • Click through each category and repeat
[- OPTIONAL ITEMS -] • (4) Rune of Scavenging • (2) Rune of the Necromancer • (2) Sigil of Blood • (2) Sigil of Fire
[- DEPOSIT ALL MATERIALS -] Use the [Deposit All Materials] button in the top right of your inventory panel.

[- USE DYE -] Open your Hero Panel > Fashion > Wardrobe > Click anything and dye it. Make sure you click [Apply to Equipment] in your fashion screen or it wont apply the dye or count towards the achievement.

[- SWAP WEAPONS -] Weapon swap 3 times
Also, you should always have a weapon in your swap set. Even if you are a class that cannot weapon swap in combat. Out of combat weapon swapping can skip a lot of animations and speed up the leveling proccess.
[- TRAIN SKILLS -] Open your Hero Panel > Training > and train some skills.

[- STARTING HEART -] Just starting this heart on our way to a vista. No need to finish right now.
• Kill Animals • Open Traps • Revive Downed

[- STARTING HEART -] Just starting this heart on our way to a vista. No need to finish right now.
• Kill Animals • Open Traps • Revive Downed
[- FINISHING HEART -] • Kill Animals • Open Traps • Revive Downed
[- COMPLETE HEART -] • Interact With [Damaged Writing] • Kill Everything
[- COMPLETE HEART -] • Interact With [Deyour Markers] • Kill Jotun/Wolves • Revive Lionguards
[- COMPLETE HEART -] • Interact With [Deyour Markers] • Kill Jotun/Wolves • Revive Lionguards
[- COMPLETE HEART -] • Interact With [Deyour Markers] • Kill Jotun/Wolves • Revive Lionguards
[- COMPLETE HEART -] • Interact With [Deyour Markers] • Kill Jotun/Wolves • Revive Lionguards
[- COMPLETE HEART -] • Interact With [Deyour Markers] • Kill Jotun/Wolves • Revive Lionguards
[- COMPLETE HEART -] • Interact With [Deyour Markers] • Kill Jotun/Wolves • Revive Lionguards
[- COMPLETE HEART -] • Interact With [Deyour Markers] • Kill Jotun/Wolves • Revive Lionguards
[- COMPLETE HEART -] • Kill Icebrood • Kill Wolves • Destroy [Corrupted Ice Formation] • Destroy [Corrupted Ice Fragment]
[- COMPLETE HEART -] • Kill Icebrood • Kill Wolves • Destroy [Corrupted Ice Formation] • Destroy [Corrupted Ice Fragment]
[- COMPLETE HEART -] • Kill Icebrood • Kill Wolves • Destroy [Corrupted Ice Formation] • Destroy [Corrupted Ice Fragment]
[- COMPLETE HEART -] • Kill Icebrood • Kill Wolves • Destroy [Corrupted Ice Formation] • Destroy [Corrupted Ice Fragment]

[- STARTING HEART -] • Kill Icebrood • Destroy [Corrupted Ice Formation]
Finish as much of this heart as you can here. Try to get it to at least halfway completed before moving on.
[- FINISHING HEART -] • Kill Icebrood • Destroy [Corrupted Ice Formation] • Revive Townsfolk

[- COMPLETE HEART -] • Gather [Arctic Kelp] • Kill Jellyfish
• Revive Everything
[- DODGING ATTACKS -] The area ahead is a good spot to finishing the dodging attacks achievement. Just wait for the mobs to drop ground aoes and dodge while inside of them.
[- OPTIONAL SIDEPATH -] The area ahead is a good spot to finishing the dodging attacks achievement. Just wait for the mobs to drop ground aoes and dodge while inside of them.
[- OPTIONAL SIDEPATH -] If your heart is not finished, take the sidepath to go hand in any [Durmand Priory Book] you collected.
[- COMPLETE HEART -] • Kill Everything • Destroy Everything • Revive Everything

[- COMPLETE HEART -] • Collect [Stolen Elixirs] • Destroy Grawl Idols • Interact With [Discarded Armor] • Kill Grawl
You can hand in [Stolen Elixirs] to the heart NPC to finish this heart if needed.

[- COMPLETE HEART -] • Collect [Stolen Elixirs] • Destroy Grawl Idols • Interact With [Discarded Armor] • Kill Grawl
You can hand in [Stolen Elixirs] to the heart NPC to finish this heart if needed.

[- COMPLETE HEART -] • Collect [Stolen Elixirs] • Destroy Grawl Idols • Interact With [Discarded Armor] • Kill Grawl
You can hand in [Stolen Elixirs] to the heart NPC to finish this heart if needed.

[- COMPLETE HEART -] • Collect [Stolen Elixirs] • Destroy Grawl Idols • Interact With [Discarded Armor] • Kill Grawl
You can hand in [Stolen Elixirs] to the heart NPC to finish this heart if needed.

[- COMPLETE HEART -] • Collect [Stolen Elixirs] • Destroy Grawl Idols • Interact With [Discarded Armor] • Kill Grawl
You can hand in [Stolen Elixirs] to the heart NPC to finish this heart if needed.

[- COMPLETE HEART -] • Collect [Stolen Elixirs] • Destroy Grawl Idols • Interact With [Discarded Armor] • Kill Grawl
You can hand in [Stolen Elixirs] to the heart NPC to finish this heart if needed.

[- COMPLETE HEART -] • Kill Everything • Destroy Everything • Collect [Durmand Priory Book]
You can hand in [Durmand Priory Book] to the heart NPC to finish this heart if needed.

[- COMPLETE HEART -] If there are Wounded Seraph then talk to them. Pick any option. Once you see their name change to Seraph Guard you can spam [F] and click the first option repeatidly until the heart is complete.
Otherwise you can do this heart normally by doing the following.
• Kill Everything • Destroy Everything • Revive Everything
[- COMPLETE HEART -] • Kill Everything • Destroy Everything • Revive Everything
[- COMPLETE HEART -] • Kill Icebrood • Kill Sons of Svanir • Destroy Sons of Svanir Banners
[- COMPLETE HEART -] • Kill Dredge • Destroy Gun Turrets

[- COMPLETE HEART -] • Kill Everything • Revive Everything • Interact With NPCs
You can hand in any [Meat Hunk] to the chef NPC in the small town to finish this heart if needed.
[- HAND IN -] Hand in any [Grawl Potion] you collect!
[- HAND IN -] Hand in any [Meat Hunk] You have collected.
[- HAND IN -] Hand in any [Durmand Priory Book] you have collected.
[- HERO POINT -] • The answer to the riddle is +Whit • Drink the [Raven Tonic] you recieved

[- PURCHASE TOOLS -] • Purchase a [Salvage Kit] (if needed) • Purchase a [Harvesting Sickle] • Purchase a [Logging Axe] • Purchase a [Mining Pick]
Salvage any items not needed & sell what cannot be salvaged to vendor.
What salvage kit you purchase depends on what you want to salvage. Use Basic for white/blue, use Fine for greens, and Master's for yellow/orange. As for tools, always buy the highest tools you can equip.
[- REMEMBER -] Keep all luck! Do not sell or use!

[- OPTIONAL SIDETPATH -] • Find one NPC to revive (if still needed)
[- NOTE -] This is the last spot to revevive. Be sure to find an NPC to revive here Before Moving On.

poi.copy: Continue onto [&BHQBAAA=] and continue to Hoelbrak
Continue onto [&BI8DAAA=] and continue to Lion's Arch

poi.info: [- VOLUME 1 FINISHED -] Your [Adventure Guide: Volume One] should now be finished. If its not, go to the achievement and finish it up, then return here to continue.
[- VOLUME 2 FINISHED -] Your [Adventure Guide: Volume Two] should now be finished. If its not, go to the achievement and finish it up, then return here to continue.
[- STARTING VOLUME 2 -] Starting [Adventure Guide: Volume Two] now. Follow the --TEAL-- trail.
[- STARTING VOLUME 3 -] Starting [Adventure Guide: Volume Three] now. Follow the --PINK-- trail.
